description.value:
An asymmetric composite bow from eastern traditions, taller than the archer who wields it and shot from a low grip. Highly accurate at range with exceptional technique, and surprisingly effective from the ground at close range.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Ranged d6 (80/320), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Ranged d8 (100/400), Piercing, Sighted
MasterTwo-Handed, Ranged d8 (100/400), Piercing, Sighted, fluid targeting
Master PerkYou gain +2 to attack rolls against a different target from your previous attack. While on foot, you do not suffer disadvantage on attack rolls while prone.

rmeData.masterPerk: +2 to attack rolls when targeting a different creature than your previous attack. While on foot, you do not suffer disadvantage on attacks while prone.
